description_long: This cabinetry unit is a large, modular piece constructed primarily from wood with a natural finish, featuring a combination of tall pantry sections, overhead cabinets, and a lower base with drawers and open shelving. The front face displays multiple compartments, including double-door cabinets, single-door sections, and a set of drawers with curved finger groove handles. Black accent panels are integrated into the lower section, providing visual contrast and likely serving as work surfaces or open shelves. The cabinetry is designed for floor-standing installation, with ample storage space suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or communal spaces. The overall structure is rectilinear, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic. The visible hardware includes finger groove handles and possible drawer slides, but no external hinges or knobs are apparent.
description: A large, modern wood cabinetry unit with multiple doors, drawers, and black accent shelves, designed for floor-standing use. Features finger groove handles and a mix of storage compartments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth and layered structure of the cabinetry, with wood grain visible and black accent panels partially exposed.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the L-shaped layout, the arrangement of compartments, and the black accent surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full height and depth, with the wood finish and minimal visible hardware.
description_view_3: Frontal view revealing all doors, drawers, open shelves, and the main interactive features including finger groove handles and black accent panels.
attribute_cabinet_type: tall pantry cabinet with base drawer unit and overhead storage
attribute_door_configuration: double door, single door, open shelf, multiple drawers
